title: Egghead Siege Begins — Chapter 1090
main_description: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches. This chapter contains 5 structured story parts and 209 cleaned dialogue lines.
key_events: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
The cleaned dialogue and scene beats follow the chapter’s main action in display-ready form.
